title: SSC MTS and Havaldar (CBIC & CBN) Examination 2024
age_limit: 18-25 years and 18-27 years. Relaxations: SC/ST (5 yrs), OBC (3 yrs).
qualification: Matriculation (10th Class) Pass from a recognized Board.
pattern_table:
Session|Subject|Questions|Marks
I|Numerical & Mathematical Ability|20|60
I|Reasoning Ability|20|60
II|General Awareness|25|75
II|English Language|25|75
instructions: Apply online at ssc.gov.in. Ensure photograph is recent and without cap/spectacles.
selection_process: Computer Based Examination (CBE) followed by PET/PST (for Havaldar only).
job_description: Staff Selection Commission has released the notification for Multi Tasking (Non-Technical) Staff and Havaldar positions. This is a massive central government recruitment drive.

title: IBPS CRP Clerk XIV Recruitment 2024
age_limit: 20-28 years as on 01.07.2024. Standard government relaxations apply.
qualification: Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Test|No. of Qs|Max Marks|Time
English Language|30|30|20 Min
Numerical Ability|35|35|20 Min
Reasoning Ability|35|35|20 Min
instructions: Registration is through IBPS official portal. Candidates must have a valid personal email ID.
job_description: IBPS is conducting the Common Recruitment Process for selection of personnel for Clerical cadre posts in participating banks across India.

title: RRB Centralised Employment Notice (CEN) No. 02/2024
age_limit: 18-33 years. Age relaxation of 3 years included as one-time measure.
qualification: 10th Pass + ITI or Diploma/Degree in Engineering (specific to post).
pattern_table:
Subject|Questions|Marks
General Science|25|25
Mathematics|25|25
General Intelligence|30|30
General Awareness|20|20
instructions: Applications are accepted only through RRB regional websites. Multiple applications will be rejected.
selection_process: CBT-1, CBT-2, PET, Document Verification, and Medical Examination.
job_description: Railway Recruitment Board is hiring technicians for various departments across all railway zones in India.

title: UPSC Civil Services Examination 2024
qualification: Bachelor's degree from any recognized University.
pattern_table:
Stage|Paper|Marks|Duration
Prelims|General Studies I|200|2 Hours
Prelims|CSAT (GS II)|200|2 Hours
instructions: Candidates must check eligibility before applying. Mains will be descriptive type.
application_fee:
General/OBC: ₹100
Female/SC/ST/Persons with Benchmark Disability: Exempted
selection_process: Preliminary Exam, Main Exam, and Personality Test (Interview).
job_description: The Civil Services Examination is a nationwide competitive examination in India conducted by the Union Public Service Commission.

title: SBI Recruitment of Probationary Officers (CGE-2024)
age_limit: 21-30 years. Age relaxations apply to reserved categories.
qualification: Graduation in any discipline. Final year students are also eligible.
pattern_table:
Phase|Test|Marks|Duration
I|English Language|30|20 Min
I|Quantitative Aptitude|35|20 Min
I|Reasoning Ability|35|20 Min
instructions: Guidelines for scanning and uploading of Photograph and Signature must be followed strictly.
selection_process: Phase I: Prelims, Phase II: Mains (Objective + Descriptive), Phase III: Psychometric Test & Interview.
job_description: SBI is hiring Probationary Officers for its various branches. POs are entry-level management positions with high growth potential.
